'''âl-v-f''' ('''lavafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neighbour|neighbour]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neighbour|neighbour]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-v-f
|-
! Lemma
| lavafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lavafithi|lavafithi]] || [[word:lavafiji|lavafiji]] || [[word:lavafishi|lavafishi]] || [[word:lavafi|lavafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lavafuthuth|lavafuthuth]] || [[word:lavafujuj|lavafujuj]] || [[word:lavafushush|lavafushush]] || [[word:lavaf|lavaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lavafuthu|lavafuthu]] || [[word:lavafuju|lavafuju]] || [[word:lavafushu|lavafushu]] || [[word:lavafu|lavafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lavafufuth|lavafufuth]] || [[word:lavafufuj|lavafufuj]] || [[word:lavafufush|lavafufush]] || [[word:lavafuf|lavafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lavafethe|lavafethe]] || [[word:lavafeje|lavafeje]] || [[word:lavafeshe|lavafeshe]] || [[word:lavafe|lavafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lavafothoth|lavafothoth]] || [[word:lavafojoj|lavafojoj]] || [[word:lavafoshosh|lavafoshosh]] || [[word:lavaf|lavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lavafotho|lavafotho]] || [[word:lavafojo|lavafojo]] || [[word:lavafosho|lavafosho]] || [[word:lavafo|lavafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lavafofoth|lavafofoth]] || [[word:lavafofoj|lavafofoj]] || [[word:lavafofosh|lavafofosh]] || [[word:lavafof|lavafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lavafĂŠthĂŠ|lavafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lavafĂŠjĂŠ|lavafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lavafĂŠshĂŠ|lavafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lavafĂŠ|lavafĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lavafathath|lavafathath]] || [[word:lavafajaj|lavafajaj]] || [[word:lavafashash|lavafashash]] || [[word:lavaf|lavaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lavafatha|lavafatha]] || [[word:lavafaja|lavafaja]] || [[word:lavafasha|lavafasha]] || [[word:lavafa|lavafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lavafafath|lavafafath]] || [[word:lavafafaj|lavafafaj]] || [[word:lavafafash|lavafafash]] || [[word:lavafaf|lavafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:lavafasha|lavafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golavafasha|golavafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilavafasha|gokilavafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:lavafnĂŒsha|lavafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golavafnknĂŒsha|golavafnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilavafnĂŒsha|gokilavafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lavafshĂ«sha|lavafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golavafnkshĂ«sha|golavafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilavafshĂ«sha|gokilavafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lavafrosha|lavafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golavafnkrosha|golavafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilavafrosha|gokilavafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lavafmusha|lavafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golavafnkmusha|golavafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilavafmusha|gokilavafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:lavafsherasha|lavafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golavafnksherasha|golavafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilavafsherasha|gokilavafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:lavafngasha|lavafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golavafnkngasha|golavafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilavafngasha|gokilavafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lavafyasha|lavafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golavafnkyasha|golavafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilavafyasha|gokilavafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:lavafyamasha|lavafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golavafnkyamasha|golavafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilavafyamasha|gokilavafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:lavafnĂŒshĂ«sha|lavafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golavafnknĂŒshĂ«sha|golavafnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilavafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokilavafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lavafnĂŒrosha|lavafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golavafnknĂŒrosha|golavafnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilavafnĂŒrosha|gokilavafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lavafnĂŒmusha|lavafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golavafnknĂŒmusha|golavafnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilavafnĂŒmusha|gokilavafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:lavafshĂ«nĂŒsha|lavafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golavafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|golavafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilavafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokilavafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lavafshĂ«rosha|lavafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golavafnkshĂ«rosha|golavafnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilavafshĂ«rosha|gokilavafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lavafshĂ«musha|lavafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golavafnkshĂ«musha|golavafnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilavafshĂ«musha|gokilavafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:lavafronĂŒsha|lavafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golavafnkronĂŒsha|golavafnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilavafronĂŒsha|gokilavafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:lavafroshĂ«sha|lavafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golavafnkroshĂ«sha|golavafnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilavafroshĂ«sha|gokilavafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lavafromusha|lavafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golavafnkromusha|golavafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilavafromusha|gokilavafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:lavafmunĂŒsha|lavafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golavafnkmunĂŒsha|golavafnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilavafmunĂŒsha|gokilavafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:lavafmushĂ«sha|lavafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golavafnkmushĂ«sha|golavafnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilavafmushĂ«sha|gokilavafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lavafmurosha|lavafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golavafnkmurosha|golavafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilavafmurosha|gokilavafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:lavaf|lavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lĂŠvĂŠf|lĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holavaf|holavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:holĂŠvĂŠf|holĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholavaf|hoholavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholĂŠvĂŠf|hoholĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒlavaf|nĂŒlavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒlĂŠvĂŠf|nĂŒlĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlavaf|nĂŒnĂŒlavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠvĂŠf|nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻlavaf|nĂŻlavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻlĂŠvĂŠf|nĂŻlĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlavaf|nĂŻnĂŻlavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠvĂŠf|nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulavaf|lulavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lulĂŠvĂŠf|lulĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululavaf|lululavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululĂŠvĂŠf|lululĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilavaf|lilavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lilĂŠvĂŠf|lilĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililavaf|lililavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililĂŠvĂŠf|lililĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolavaf|kolavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kolĂŠvĂŠf|kolĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolavaf|kokolavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolĂŠvĂŠf|kokolĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelavaf|kelavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kelĂŠvĂŠf|kelĂŠvĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelavaf|kekelavaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelĂŠvĂŠf|kekelĂŠvĂŠf]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
